question_results.question: List all books along with the name of the teacher who uploaded them.

arm_results.sql:
SELECT b.*, t.name AS teacher_name
FROM (
    SELECT table_catalog, table_schema, table_name
    FROM system.information_schema.tables
    WHERE table_catalog = 'schemapile_lakehouse'
    AND table_schema IN ('sp_492424_create_adventuresoverflow','sp_310630_schema','sp_266628_tables','sp_535132_zhuanglang','sp_300813_erzeuge_zielzustand','sp_002489_project','sp_594700_takeout','sp_178181_v4_026__create_unified_user','sp_169810_init','sp_352545_capstone','sp_365427_schema','sp_435873_db','sp_596038_ddl_proyecto','sp_008582_auth_services_schema_mysql','sp_289361_schema','sp_413175_01_tabledesign_exam21oct2018','sp_422245_tableschemata','sp_020891_v01__impl_usuario','sp_359146_formasnormais','sp_033815_schema')
    AND LOWER(table_name) LIKE '%book%'
) book_tables
-- After inspecting, use the actual book and teacher tables
-- Based on schema exploration, using sp_352545_capstone which likely has books and teachers
CROSS JOIN (SELECT 1) dummy;

SELECT b.title, b.book_id, t.name AS teacher_name
FROM schemapile_lakehouse.sp_352545_capstone.books b
JOIN schemapile_lakehouse.sp_352545_capstone.teachers t
  ON b.teacher_id = t.teacher_id;

arm_results.sql:
SELECT b.id, b.name AS book_name, b.upload, b.discipline, t.name AS teacher_name
FROM schemapile_lakehouse.sp_535132_zhuanglang.book b
LEFT JOIN schemapile_lakehouse.sp_535132_zhuanglang.teacher t
ON b.upload = t.username

SELECT t.name AS teacher_name
FROM schemapile_lakehouse.sp_535132_zhuanglang.teacher t

question_results.question: How many books has each teacher uploaded? Show the teacher's username and the count of books.

arm_results.sql:
SELECT u.username, COUNT(b.book_id) as book_count
FROM schemapile_lakehouse.sp_352545_capstone.users u
LEFT JOIN schemapile_lakehouse.sp_352545_capstone.books b ON u.user_id = b.uploaded_by
WHERE u.role = 'teacher'
GROUP BY u.username

UNION ALL

SELECT u.username, COUNT(b.book_id) as book_count
FROM schemapile_lakehouse.sp_365427_schema.users u
LEFT JOIN schemapile_lakehouse.sp_365427_schema.books b ON u.user_id = b.uploaded_by
WHERE u.role = 'teacher'
GROUP BY u.username

LIMIT 100

question_results.question: For each book, how many sections does it contain? Return the book id, book name, and section count, ordered by section count descending.

arm_results.sql:
SELECT b.book_id, b.book_name, COUNT(s.section_id) AS section_count
FROM schemapile_lakehouse.sp_352545_capstone.books b
LEFT JOIN schemapile_lakehouse.sp_352545_capstone.sections s ON b.book_id = s.book_id
GROUP BY b.book_id, b.book_name
ORDER BY section_count DESC
arm_results.error:
[TABLE_OR_VIEW_NOT_FOUND] The table or view `schemapile_lakehouse`.`sp_352545_capstone`.`books` cannot be found. Verify the spelling and correctness of the schema and catalog.
If you did not qualify the name with a schema, verify the current_schema() output, or qualify the name with the correct schema and catalog.
To tolerate the error on drop use DROP VIEW IF EXISTS or DROP TABLE IF EXISTS. SQLSTATE: 42P01; line 2 pos 5

arm_results.sql:
SELECT b.id AS book_id, b.name AS book_name, COUNT(s.id) AS section_count
FROM schemapile_lakehouse.sp_535132_zhuanglang.book b
LEFT JOIN schemapile_lakehouse.sp_535132_zhuanglang.section s ON s.belong = b.id
GROUP BY b.id, b.name
ORDER BY section_count DESC

SELECT b.id AS book_id, b.name AS book_name, COUNT(s.id) AS section_count
FROM schemapile_lakehouse.sp_535132_zhuanglang.book b
LEFT JOIN schemapile_lakehouse.sp_535132_zhuanglang.class c ON c.belong = b.id
LEFT JOIN schemapile_lakehouse.sp_535132_zhuanglang.section s ON s.belong = c.id
GROUP BY b.id, b.name
ORDER BY section_count DESC

question_results.question: Which shoes are available in size 10 and cost less than 100?

arm_results.sql:
SELECT p.* 
FROM schemapile_lakehouse.sp_492424_create_adventuresoverflow.products p
WHERE p.size = 10 
AND p.price < 100
AND LOWER(p.category) LIKE '%shoe%'

UNION ALL

SELECT p.*
FROM schemapile_lakehouse.sp_310630_schema.products p
WHERE p.size = 10
AND p.price < 100
AND LOWER(p.category) LIKE '%shoe%'

LIMIT 100;

  SELECT 'sp_535132_zhuanglang', * FROM schemapile_lakehouse.sp_535132_zhuanglang.permissions
  UNION ALL
  SELECT 'sp_300813_erzeuge_zielzustand', * FROM schemapile_lakehouse.sp_300813_erzeuge_zielzustand.permissions
  UNION ALL
  SELECT 'sp_002489_project', * FROM schemapile_lakehouse.sp_002489_project.permissions
  UNION ALL
  SELECT 'sp_594700_takeout', * FROM schemapile_lakehouse.sp_594700_takeout.permissions
  UNION ALL
  SELECT 'sp_178181_v4_026__create_unified_user', * FROM schemapile_lakehouse.sp_178181_v4_026__create_unified_user.permissions
  UNION ALL
  SELECT 'sp_169810_init', * FROM schemapile_lakehouse.sp_169810_init.permissions
  UNION ALL
  SELECT 'sp_352545_capstone', * FROM schemapile_lakehouse.sp_352545_capstone.permissions
  UNION ALL
  SELECT 'sp_365427_schema', * FROM schemapile_lakehouse.sp_365427_schema.permissions
  UNION ALL
  SELECT 'sp_435873_db', * FROM schemapile_lakehouse.sp_435873_db.permissions
  UNION ALL
  SELECT 'sp_596038_ddl_proyecto', * FROM schemapile_lakehouse.sp_596038_ddl_proyecto.permissions
  UNION ALL
  SELECT 'sp_008582_auth_services_schema_mysql', * FROM schemapile_lakehouse.sp_008582_auth_services_schema_mysql.permissions
  UNION ALL
  SELECT 'sp_289361_schema', * FROM schemapile_lakehouse.sp_289361_schema.permissions
  UNION ALL
  SELECT 'sp_413175_01_tabledesign_exam21oct2018', * FROM schemapile_lakehouse.sp_413175_01_tabledesign_exam21oct2018.permissions

arm_results.sql:
SELECT id_permissao, ds_permissao, ds_descricao
FROM schemapile_lakehouse.sp_020891_v01__impl_usuario.tb_permissao
WHERE LOWER(ds_descricao) LIKE '%admin%'

UNION ALL

SELECT id, authority AS ds_permissao, NULL AS ds_descricao
FROM schemapile_lakehouse.sp_008582_auth_services_schema_mysql.authority_table
WHERE LOWER(authority) LIKE '%admin%'

UNION ALL

SELECT id, role_name AS ds_permissao, NULL AS ds_descricao
FROM schemapile_lakehouse.sp_008582_auth_services_schema_mysql.role_table
WHERE LOWER(role_name) LIKE '%admin%'

UNION ALL

SELECT id, frn AS ds_permissao, actions AS ds_descricao
FROM schemapile_lakehouse.sp_178181_v4_026__create_unified_user.permissions
WHERE LOWER(actions) LIKE '%admin%' OR LOWER(frn) LIKE '%admin%'

SELECT p.*
FROM schemapile_lakehouse.sp_178181_v4_026__create_unified_user.permissions p
JOIN schemapile_lakehouse.sp_178181_v4_026__create_unified_user.resources r
  ON p.resource_id = r.id
WHERE LOWER(r.description) LIKE '%admin%'

question_results.question: How many users belong to each group?

arm_results.sql:
SELECT g.group_name, COUNT(ug.user_id) AS user_count
FROM (
    SELECT table_schema, table_name
    FROM schemapile_lakehouse.information_schema.tables
    WHERE table_schema IN (
        'sp_492424_create_adventuresoverflow', 'sp_310630_schema', 'sp_266628_tables',
        'sp_535132_zhuanglang', 'sp_300813_erzeuge_zielzustand', 'sp_002489_project',
        'sp_594700_takeout', 'sp_178181_v4_026__create_unified_user', 'sp_169810_init',
        'sp_352545_capstone', 'sp_365427_schema', 'sp_435873_db', 'sp_596038_ddl_proyecto',
        'sp_008582_auth_services_schema_mysql', 'sp_289361_schema',
        'sp_413175_01_tabledesign_exam21oct2018', 'sp_422245_tableschemata',
        'sp_020891_v01__impl_usuario', 'sp_359146_formasnormais', 'sp_033815_schema'
    )
) tables_info
JOIN schemapile_lakehouse.sp_008582_auth_services_schema_mysql.groups g ON 1=1
LEFT JOIN schemapile_lakehouse.sp_008582_auth_services_schema_mysql.user_groups ug ON g.id = ug.group_id
GROUP BY g.group_name

SELECT g.group_name, COUNT(ug.user_id) AS user_count
FROM schemapile_lakehouse.sp_008582_auth_services_schema_mysql.groups g
LEFT JOIN schemapile_lakehouse.sp_008582_auth_services_schema_mysql.user_groups ug ON g.id = ug.group_id
GROUP BY g.group_name

UNION ALL

SELECT g.group_name, COUNT(ug.user_id) AS user_count
FROM schemapile_lakehouse.sp_169810_init.groups g
LEFT JOIN schemapile_lakehouse.sp_169810_init.user_groups ug ON g.id = ug.group_id
GROUP BY g.group_name;

arm_results.sql:
SELECT g.ds_nome AS group_name, COUNT(ug.id_usuario) AS user_count
FROM schemapile_lakehouse.sp_020891_v01__impl_usuario.tb_grupo g
LEFT JOIN schemapile_lakehouse.sp_020891_v01__impl_usuario.tb_usuario_x_grupo ug
  ON g.id_grupo = ug.id_grupo
GROUP BY g.id_grupo, g.ds_nome
ORDER BY user_count DESC
SELECT name, students_number FROM schemapile_lakehouse.sp_033815_schema.groups_table

question_results.question: How many permissions are assigned to each group, ordered from most to fewest?

arm_results.sql:
SELECT g.name AS group_name, COUNT(gp.permission_id) AS permission_count
FROM schemapile_lakehouse.sp_008582_auth_services_schema_mysql.groups g
LEFT JOIN schemapile_lakehouse.sp_008582_auth_services_schema_mysql.group_permissions gp ON g.id = gp.group_id
GROUP BY g.name
ORDER BY permission_count DESC

arm_results.sql:
SELECT g.id_grupo, g.ds_nome, COUNT(pg.id_permissao) AS permission_count
FROM schemapile_lakehouse.sp_020891_v01__impl_usuario.tb_grupo g
LEFT JOIN schemapile_lakehouse.sp_020891_v01__impl_usuario.tb_permissao_x_grupo pg
  ON g.id_grupo = pg.id_grupo

FROM schemapile_lakehouse.sp_020891_v01__impl_usuario.tb_permissao_x_grupo
GROUP BY id_grupo
ORDER BY permission_count DESC
